name: Norn Greyrat
alt_names: ノルン・グレイラット
description: Norn Greyrat is the daughter of [Zenith Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/179855/Zenith-Greyrat) and [Paul Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88347/Paul-Greyrat) and is the younger sister of [Rudeus Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/88348) and older half-sister of [Aisha Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/145459/Aisha-Greyrat).
